name: loop-it
description: Find and run bounded, verifiable coding loops for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Find and run bounded coding loops for agents.
interface.longDescription: Loop it packages a portable loop library and Agent Skill that helps Codex choose the right coding loop, turn open-ended work into bounded passes, and track progress with explicit checks, budgets, stop conditions, approval gates, and evidence logs.
defaultPrompt: Use $loop-it to create a verified bug-fix loop.
Use $loop-it to design a docs sweep loop.
Use $loop-it to run one bounded repair pass.
